---
title: "Page not found"
description: "The slide URL you followed has moved or never existed. Below is the current unit map."
format: html
search: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .err-hero {
    background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.10);
    border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem;
    margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem 0;
  }
  .err-hero h1 { color: #fecaca; margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0; border: none; }
  .err-hero p { color: #cbd5e1; margin: 0; }
  .toc-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1rem; margin: 1rem 0; }
  @media (min-width: 880px) { .toc-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
  .toc-card {
    background: rgba(20,25,40,0.65);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  }
  .toc-card h3 { color: #f1f5f9; margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0; font-size: 1.05rem; }
  .toc-card a { color: #93c5fd; text-decoration: none; }
  .toc-card a:hover { color: #fff; text-decoration: underline; }
  .toc-card ul { margin: 0; padding-left: 1.1rem; }
  .toc-card li { color: #cbd5e1; margin: 0.15rem 0; font-size: 0.92rem; }
</style>
```

::: {.err-hero}
# 404 — Page not found

The URL you followed does not exist (or no longer exists). Several SS26 slide
decks were renamed during the 2026-05-09 reorganization. Pick your destination
from the unit map below, or return to the [home page](./).
:::

## Mathematical Foundations of AI & ML

```{=html}
<div class="toc-grid">
  <div class="toc-card">
    <h3>Units 1–7 (foundations)</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/01_learning_vs_data_analysis/01_intro.html">Unit 1 — Learning vs Data Analysis</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/02_linear_algebra_pca_svd/01_intro.html">Unit 2 — Linear Algebra; PCA / SVD</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/03_regression_as_loss_minimization/01_intro.html">Unit 3 — Regression as Loss Minimization</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/04_neural_networks_backprop/01_intro.html">Unit 4 — Neural Networks (Neurons → CNNs)</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/05_clustering_and_autoencoders/01_intro.html">Unit 5 — Clustering & Autoencoders</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/06_loss_landscapes_optimization/01_intro.html">Unit 6 — Loss Landscapes & Optimization</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/07_generalization_bias_variance/01_intro.html">Unit 7 — Generalization, Bias-Variance, Tree Ensembles</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="toc-card">
    <h3>Units 8–14 (advanced)</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/08_probabilistic_view_of_learning/01_intro.html">Unit 8 — Probabilistic View of Learning</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/09_latent_spaces_advanced/01_intro.html">Unit 9 — Latent Spaces & Representation Learning</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/10_attention_transformers/01_intro.html">Unit 10 — Attention & Transformers</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/11_generative_vae_diffusion/01_intro.html">Unit 11 — Generative Models (VAE & Diffusion)</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/12_uncertainty_in_predictions/01_intro.html">Unit 12 — Uncertainty in Predictions</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/13_physics_informed_learning/01_intro.html">Unit 13 — Physics-Informed Learning</a></li>
      <li><a href="mathematical_foundations_of_ai_and_ml/14_explainability_limits_trust/01_intro.html">Unit 14 — Explainability, Limits, Trust</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Materials Genomics

```{=html}
<div class="toc-grid">
  <div class="toc-card">
    <h3>Units 1–7 (physics & representations)</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/01_intro/01_intro.html">Unit 1 — What is Materials Genomics?</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/02_qm_postulates_and_atoms/01_intro.html">Unit 2 — QM Postulates & Multi-Electron Atoms</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/03_quantum_chemistry_methods/01_intro.html">Unit 3 — Quantum Chemistry Methods (HF, MP, CC, DFT)</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/04_thermodynamics_and_atomistic_simulation/01_intro.html">Unit 4 — Thermodynamics & Classical Atomistic Simulation</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/05_graph_based_rep/01_intro.html">Unit 5 — Graph-Based Crystal Representations</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/06_local_atomic_envs/01_intro.html">Unit 6 — Local Atomic Environments</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/07_regression_and_generalization_in_materials_data/01_intro.html">Unit 7 — Regression and Generalization</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="toc-card">
    <h3>Units 8–13 (learning & discovery)</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/08_neural_networks_for_materials_properties/01_intro.html">Unit 8 — Neural Networks for Materials Properties</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/09_representation_learning_and_feature_discovery/01_intro.html">Unit 9 — Representation Learning</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/10_latent_spaces_of_materials/01_intro.html">Unit 10 — Latent Spaces of Materials</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/11_clustering_vs_discovery_in_materials_spaces/01_intro.html">Unit 11 — Clustering vs Discovery</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/12_uncertainty_aware_discovery_and_gaussian_processes/01_intro.html">Unit 12 — Uncertainty-Aware Discovery & GPs</a></li>
      <li><a href="materials_genomics/13_constraints_trust_and_integration_outlook/01_intro.html">Unit 13 — Physical Constraints, Trust & Outlook</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Machine Learning for Characterization and Processing

```{=html}
<div class="toc-grid">
  <div class="toc-card">
    <h3>Units 1–7 (data & representations)</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit01_intro/01_intro.html">Unit 1 — What makes materials data special?</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit02_physics_of_data/01_intro.html">Unit 2 — Physics of data formation</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit03_data_quality/01_intro.html">Unit 3 — Data quality, labels, leakage</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit04_microstructure_representations/01_intro.html">Unit 4 — Microstructure metrics → learned reps</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit05_unsupervised_learning/01_intro.html">Unit 5 — Unsupervised methods (clustering & AE)</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit06_transfer_learning/01_intro.html">Unit 6 — Data scarcity & transfer learning</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit07_time_series/01_intro.html">Unit 7 — Time-series & process monitoring</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="toc-card">
    <h3>Units 8–14 (UQ, automation, physics)</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit08_generalization_robustness/01_intro.html">Unit 8 — Generalization & process windows</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit09_inverse_problems/09_inverse_problems.html">Unit 9 — Inverse problems & process maps</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit10_characterization_signals/10_characterization_signals.html">Unit 10 — ML for characterization signals</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit11_automation/11_automation.html">Unit 11 — Automation in microscopy</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit12_uncertainty_gp/12_uncertainty_gp.html">Unit 12 — Uncertainty-aware regression & GPs</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit13_pinns/13_pinns.html">Unit 13 — Physics-informed & constrained ML</a></li>
      <li><a href="ml_for_characterization_and_processing/unit14_reflection/14_reflection.html">Unit 14 — Integration, limits, reflection</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Other content

- **[Data Science for Electron Microscopy](./)** — see the home page for the 9-unit DSE series
- **[Conference Talks](./)** — 2025 MC, 2025 M&M

---

If you arrived here from a citation, you may have an old slug. The 2026-05-09
realignment renamed several MG and MFML units. See `internal/mg_realignment_old_to_new.md`
in the source repository for the historical mapping.
